reports.title: Instructions
reports.query:
##### Lab Data Spec Metadata

Select the Study in the table  - click on the **SELECT** button.

You can filter on Project to limit the rows in the Study table.

If you want to filer in the table then click on the column header to activate the vertial dot menu (right side of column). 

You can sort and filter. 



##### Visit tab

Will list the visits where activities are in the Laboratory Assessment group - as specified in the Study SoA

##### Contents tab
Will list the assessments to be collected for the study. Note, it requires that an Activity Instance has been chosen for the Activity.

reports.title: Select Study (required)
reports.query:
MATCH (n1)-[:LATEST]->(n2)-[:HAS_PROJECT]->(sp:StudyProjectField)<-[:HAS_FIELD]-(proj:Project)
WHERE 
  // Scenario 1: No filters - show all studies
  (size($neodash_project_name) = 0 AND $neodash_study_id = '')
  OR
  // Scenario 2: Only project selected - show all studies in those projects
  (size($neodash_project_name) > 0 AND proj.name IN $neodash_project_name AND $neodash_study_id = '')
  OR
  // Scenario 3: Both project and study selected - show only that study
  (proj.name IN $neodash_project_name AND $neodash_study_id <> '' AND toString(proj.name + '-' + n2.study_number) = $neodash_study_id)
  OR
  // Scenario 4: Only study selected - show only that study
  (size($neodash_project_name) = 0 AND $neodash_study_id <> '' AND toString(proj.name + '-' + n2.study_number) = $neodash_study_id)


WITH n1, proj, n2,
  CASE
    WHEN (n2.study_number IS NOT NULL AND n2.study_acronym IS NOT NULL)
    THEN toString(proj.name + '-' + n2.study_number) + ' [' + n2.study_acronym + ']'
    ELSE toString(proj.name + '-' + n2.study_number)
  END AS StudyRef

RETURN DISTINCT 'Select' AS Click, StudyRef, n1.uid AS __uid
ORDER BY StudyRef

reports.title: Select lab specification version (mandatory)
reports.query:
MATCH (model_root:DataModelIGRoot)-->(n:DataModelIGValue)
-[:HAS_DATASET]->(dataset_value:DatasetInstance)<--(:Dataset {uid: "LAB"})
WHERE toLower(apoc.text.join([n.`description`,' - V',n.version_number],"")) CONTAINS toLower($input) 
RETURN DISTINCT apoc.text.join([n.`description`,' - V',n.version_number],"") as value, apoc.text.join([n.`description`,' - V',n.version_number],"") as display ORDER BY size(toString(value)) ASC LIMIT 5

reports.title: Filter on Project(optional)
reports.query:
MATCH (n:`Project`) 
WHERE toLower(toString(n.`name`)) CONTAINS toLower($input) 
RETURN DISTINCT n.`name` as value,  n.`name` as display ORDER BY size(toString(value)) ASC LIMIT 5

reports.title: Search Study
reports.query:
MATCH (n:`StudyValue`)-[:HAS_PROJECT]->(sp:StudyProjectField)<-[:HAS_FIELD]-(proj:Project) WHERE (size($neodash_project_name)>0 AND proj.name IN $neodash_project_name) OR size($neodash_project_name)=0
WITH n, proj
WHERE toLower(toString(proj.name+'-' + n.study_number)) CONTAINS toLower($input) 
RETURN DISTINCT toString(proj.name+'-'+n.study_number) as value,  toString(proj.name +'-' + n.study_number) as display ORDER BY size(toString(value)) ASC LIMIT 100

reports.title: Visits - $neodash_study_name
reports.query:
MATCH
  (n:StudyRoot {uid: $neodash_studyroot_uid})-[:LATEST]->
  (s:StudyValue)-->
  (visit:StudyVisit)-[r2:HAS_VISIT_NAME]->(n3:VisitNameRoot)-->(n4:VisitNameValue)
WHERE 
  // Show visits NOT in the exclusion list (default behavior)
  NOT toLower(visit.visit_class) IN ['non_visit', 'unscheduled_visit']
  OR
  // OR include excluded visits if explicitly specified in parameter
  (size($neodash_visit_class) > 0 AND visit.visit_class IN $neodash_visit_class)
OPTIONAL MATCH(visit)-->
  (:StudyActivitySchedule)<--
  (sact:StudyActivity)-->
  (:StudyActivitySubGroup)-->
  (asgv:ActivitySubGroupValue)-->
  (:ActivityValidGroup)-->
  (:ActivityGroupValue {name: "Laboratory Assessments"})
WHERE asgv.name <> "Antibodies" AND asgv.name <> "PK Sampling"
WITH DISTINCT
  visit,
  CASE WHEN visit.visit_class IN $neodash_visit_class THEN apoc.text.capitalize(toLower(replace(visit.visit_class, '_', ' '))) ELSE n4.name END AS `Visit label in protocol`,
  " " AS `Visit label in supplier database`,
  CASE WHEN visit.visit_class IN $neodash_visit_class THEN toUpper(visit.visit_class) ELSE visit.short_visit_label END AS `Visit in data file`,
  toInteger(visit.unique_visit_number) AS visit_order,
  visit.visit_number AS visit_number
ORDER BY visit_order
RETURN DISTINCT
  `Visit label in protocol`,
  `Visit label in supplier database`,
  `Visit in data file`

settings.description: Visits for Laboratory Assessments (excluding visits for Antibodies and PK Sampling)

reports.title: Reminder
reports.query: By default, rows per page is set to 5. Please select the appropriate number of rows per page to display all required records.

reports.title: Types of visits
reports.query:
Consider if **UNSCHEDULED** and/or **NON-VISIT** options should be included in the Visits sheet. 

Data from unscheduled samples (see section 1.2.1 in https://novonordisk.sharepoint.com/:w:/r/sites/ClinicalDataManagement/DMTGDocs/Laboratory%20Process%20Guideline%20for%20Data%20Management%20V.2.0.docx?d=wd8b84eb397fe406f97220ecc4cbdc08c&csf=1&web=1&e=Qol6Yu&isSPOFile=1&%3D&sdata=MXNOUnlLYmlXREhvTlZKUlFHWDdJLzFGczd2YjVMTUZhU1BoNlhMMW5BYz0%3D&ovuser=fdfed7bd-9f6a-44a1-b694-6e39c468c150%2CBAPU%40novonordisk.com) allowed per protocol can be received from the laboratory with “VISIT = UNSCHEDULED” or ”VISIT = NON-VISIT”. 

It is recommended that “VISIT = NON-VISIT” is used for data from samples that is taken due to AE requiring additional data collection or similar, e.g., a systemic hypersensitivity sample or an extra blood test in case of suspected pregnancy. 

”VISIT = NON-VISIT” will serve as an identifier for these special cases, also in cases where a parameter is analysed for both via a scheduled sample and an unscheduled sample, if topiccd (and therefore also CAT and SUBCAT) is the same. 

An example of this could be an AB that should be analysed for both on a normal visit and also in case of hypersensitivity.

For phase 2-4 it should also be considered to include “VISIT = UNSCHEDULED”, to enable transfer of samples where the CL cannot assign it to a specific visit (e.g., site forgot to mark at which visit sample was taken).

reports.title: Include non - scheduled visit types
reports.query:
MATCH (n:StudyRoot {uid: $neodash_studyroot_uid})-[:LATEST]->(s:StudyValue)-->(v:StudyVisit)
WHERE v.visit_class IN ['NON_VISIT','UNSCHEDULED_VISIT'] 
  AND toLower(toString(v.visit_class)) CONTAINS toLower($input)
WITH collect(DISTINCT v.visit_class) as classes
WITH CASE WHEN size(classes) = 0 THEN [null] ELSE classes END as final_classes
UNWIND final_classes as vc
RETURN vc as value, vc as display
ORDER BY size(toString(value)) ASC
LIMIT 5

reports.title: LAB Content - $neodash_study_name -TABLE 1: REMOVE unwanted lab assessments by checking the boxes on the left
reports.query:
MATCH
  (:StudyRoot {uid: $neodash_studyroot_uid})-[:LATEST]->
  (s:StudyValue)
WITH s
MATCH(s)-->
  (s_act:StudyActivity)-[:STUDY_ACTIVITY_HAS_STUDY_ACTIVITY_SUBGROUP]->
  (:StudyActivitySubGroup)-[:HAS_SELECTED_ACTIVITY_SUBGROUP]->
  (asgv:ActivitySubGroupValue)-[:HAS_GROUP]->
  (sg:ActivityValidGroup)-[:IN_GROUP]->
  (:ActivityGroupValue {name: "Laboratory Assessments"})
WHERE asgv.name <> "Antibodies" AND asgv.name <> "PK Sampling"  AND asgv.name <> "Pharmacodynamics"
WITH DISTINCT s, s_act
MATCH
  (s_act)-[:HAS_SELECTED_ACTIVITY]->
  (act:ActivityValue)-[:HAS_GROUPING]->
  (:ActivityGrouping)<-[:HAS_ACTIVITY]-
  (ai:ActivityInstanceValue)<-[:HAS_SELECTED_ACTIVITY_INSTANCE]-
  (:StudyActivityInstance)<-[:HAS_STUDY_ACTIVITY_INSTANCE]-
  (s)-[:HAS_STUDY_VISIT]->
  (visit:StudyVisit)
WITH DISTINCT s, act, ai
CALL {
  WITH s, act, ai
  OPTIONAL MATCH (ai)-[:CONTAINS_ACTIVITY_ITEM]->(aitm1:ActivityItem)
  WITH DISTINCT aitm1
  OPTIONAL MATCH
    (aitm1)-[:HAS_UNIT_DEFINITION]->
    (:UnitDefinitionRoot)-[:LATEST]->
    (p_unitdef:UnitDefinitionValue)-[:HAS_CT_DIMENSION]->(context:CTTermContext)<-[:HAS_CT_DIMENSION]-(possible_units:UnitDefinitionValue)
  RETURN collect(DISTINCT possible_units.name) AS unitcoll
}
CALL {
 WITH s, act, ai
OPTIONAL MATCH
    (ai)-[:CONTAINS_ACTIVITY_ITEM]->
    (aitm1:ActivityItem)<--
    (:ActivityItemClassRoot)-[:LATEST]->
    (:ActivityItemClassValue {name: "standard_unit"})
WITH DISTINCT aitm1
OPTIONAL MATCH
  (aitm1)-[:HAS_UNIT_DEFINITION]->
  (:UnitDefinitionRoot)-[:LATEST]->
  (std_unit:UnitDefinitionValue)-[:HAS_CT_UNIT]->(:CTTermContext)-[:HAS_SELECTED_TERM]->(:CTTermRoot)<-[:HAS_TERM_ROOT]-(cdisc_std_unit:CTCodelistTerm)
RETURN std_unit, cdisc_std_unit
}
CALL {
  WITH s, act, ai
  OPTIONAL MATCH
    (ai)-[:CONTAINS_ACTIVITY_ITEM]->
    (aitm1:ActivityItem)<--
    (:ActivityItemClassRoot)-[:LATEST]->
    (:ActivityItemClassValue {name: "specimen"})
  WITH DISTINCT aitm1
  OPTIONAL MATCH
  (aitm1)-[:HAS_CT_TERM]->
  (:CTTermContext)-[:HAS_SELECTED_TERM]->
  (:CTTermRoot)<-[:HAS_TERM_ROOT]-(subm_val1:CTCodelistTerm)
  RETURN subm_val1.submission_value AS lbspec
}
CALL {
  WITH s, act, ai
  OPTIONAL MATCH
    (ai)-[:CONTAINS_ACTIVITY_ITEM]->
    (aitm2:ActivityItem)<--
    (:ActivityItemClassRoot)-[:LATEST]->
    (:ActivityItemClassValue {name: "method"})
  WITH DISTINCT aitm2
  OPTIONAL MATCH
    (aitm2)-[:HAS_CT_TERM]->
    (:CTTermContext)-[:HAS_SELECTED_TERM]->
    (:CTTermRoot)<-[:HAS_TERM_ROOT]-(subm_val2:CTCodelistTerm)
  RETURN subm_val2.submission_value AS lbmethod
}
CALL {
  WITH s, act, ai
  OPTIONAL MATCH
    (ai)-[:CONTAINS_ACTIVITY_ITEM]->
    (aitm3:ActivityItem)<--
    (:ActivityItemClassRoot)-[:LATEST]->
    (:ActivityItemClassValue {name: "original_result"})
  WITH DISTINCT aitm3
  OPTIONAL MATCH
    (aitm3)-[:HAS_CT_TERM]->
    (:CTTermContext)-[:HAS_SELECTED_TERM]->
    (:CTTermRoot)<-[:HAS_TERM_ROOT]-(subm_val3:CTCodelistTerm)
  RETURN collect(DISTINCT subm_val3.submission_value) AS lbstresc
}
WITH
  act,
  ai,
  CASE
    WHEN size(lbmethod) > 0 THEN apoc.text.join(lbmethod,";")
    ELSE ' '
  END AS lbmethod,
  CASE
    WHEN size(lbspec) > 0 THEN apoc.text.join(lbspec,";") 
    ELSE ' '
  END AS lbspec,
  CASE
    WHEN size(unitcoll) > 0 THEN apoc.text.join(unitcoll,";")
    ELSE ' '
  END AS possible_units,
  CASE
    WHEN size(lbstresc) > 0 THEN apoc.text.join(lbstresc,";") 
    ELSE ' '
  END AS lbstresc,
  CASE WHEN std_unit.name is null THEN ' ' ELSE std_unit.name END AS `Standard unit`, 
  CASE WHEN cdisc_std_unit.submission_value is null THEN ' ' ELSE cdisc_std_unit.submission_value END AS `CDISC Submission unit`
  RETURN DISTINCT act.name AS `Assessment description based on protocol`,
  ' ' AS `Supplier Assessment`,
  ' ' AS `Supplier Unit`,
  ' ' AS `Supplier Method Name`,
  ' ' as UNITCOLL,
  lbspec AS LBSPEC,
  ai.topic_code AS TOPICCD,
  lbstresc as `Valid LBSTRESC values for categorical results`,
  lbmethod AS LBMETHOD,
  ' ' AS  LBSPCCND,
  ' ' AS LBANMETH,
CASE 
    WHEN $neodash_lab_specification_version contains 'V8.0' THEN ai.adam_param_code ELSE 'remove column (applicable for V8.0)'
    END AS ADaMCD,
`Standard unit`,
`CDISC Submission unit`,
possible_units as `Units in units dimension`

styleRules.field: Valid LBSTRESC values for categorical results

reports.title: Reminder
reports.query:
By default, rows per page is set to 5. Please select the appropriate number of rows per page to display all required records.

If assessments are removed the resulting table to export is the lower one.

reports.title: LAB Content - $neodash_study_name -TABLE 2 : The final list of assessments that can be exported
reports.query:
MATCH
  (:StudyRoot {uid: $neodash_studyroot_uid})-[:LATEST]->
  (s:StudyValue)
WITH s
MATCH(s)-->
  (s_act:StudyActivity)-[:STUDY_ACTIVITY_HAS_STUDY_ACTIVITY_SUBGROUP]->
  (:StudyActivitySubGroup)-[:HAS_SELECTED_ACTIVITY_SUBGROUP]->
  (asgv:ActivitySubGroupValue)-[:HAS_GROUP]->
  (sg:ActivityValidGroup)-[:IN_GROUP]->
  (:ActivityGroupValue {name: "Laboratory Assessments"})
WHERE asgv.name <> "Antibodies" AND asgv.name <> "PK Sampling"  AND asgv.name <> "Pharmacodynamics"
WITH DISTINCT s, s_act
MATCH
  (s_act)-[:HAS_SELECTED_ACTIVITY]->
  (act:ActivityValue)-[:HAS_GROUPING]->
  (:ActivityGrouping)<-[:HAS_ACTIVITY]-
  (ai:ActivityInstanceValue)<-[:HAS_SELECTED_ACTIVITY_INSTANCE]-
  (:StudyActivityInstance)<-[:HAS_STUDY_ACTIVITY_INSTANCE]-
  (s)-[:HAS_STUDY_VISIT]->
  (visit:StudyVisit)
WITH DISTINCT s, act, ai WHERE size($neodash_removed_activity) = 0  OR NOT ai.topic_code IN $neodash_removed_activity
CALL {
  WITH s, act, ai
  OPTIONAL MATCH (ai)-[:CONTAINS_ACTIVITY_ITEM]->(aitm1:ActivityItem)
  WITH DISTINCT aitm1
  OPTIONAL MATCH
    (aitm1)-[:HAS_UNIT_DEFINITION]->
    (:UnitDefinitionRoot)-[:LATEST]->
    (p_unitdef:UnitDefinitionValue)-[:HAS_CT_DIMENSION]->(context:CTTermContext)<-[:HAS_CT_DIMENSION]-(possible_units:UnitDefinitionValue)
  RETURN collect(DISTINCT possible_units.name) AS unitcoll
}
CALL {
 WITH s, act, ai
OPTIONAL MATCH
    (ai)-[:CONTAINS_ACTIVITY_ITEM]->
    (aitm1:ActivityItem)<--
    (:ActivityItemClassRoot)-[:LATEST]->
    (:ActivityItemClassValue {name: "standard_unit"})
WITH DISTINCT aitm1
OPTIONAL MATCH
  (aitm1)-[:HAS_UNIT_DEFINITION]->
  (:UnitDefinitionRoot)-[:LATEST]->
  (std_unit:UnitDefinitionValue)-[:HAS_CT_UNIT]->(:CTTermContext)-[:HAS_SELECTED_TERM]->(:CTTermRoot)<-[:HAS_TERM_ROOT]-(cdisc_std_unit:CTCodelistTerm)
RETURN std_unit, cdisc_std_unit
}
CALL {
  WITH s, act, ai
  OPTIONAL MATCH
    (ai)-[:CONTAINS_ACTIVITY_ITEM]->
    (aitm1:ActivityItem)<--
    (:ActivityItemClassRoot)-[:LATEST]->
    (:ActivityItemClassValue {name: "specimen"})
  WITH DISTINCT aitm1
  OPTIONAL MATCH
  (aitm1)-[:HAS_CT_TERM]->
  (:CTTermContext)-[:HAS_SELECTED_TERM]->
  (:CTTermRoot)<-[:HAS_TERM_ROOT]-(subm_val1:CTCodelistTerm)
  RETURN subm_val1.submission_value AS lbspec
}
CALL {
  WITH s, act, ai
  OPTIONAL MATCH
    (ai)-[:CONTAINS_ACTIVITY_ITEM]->
    (aitm2:ActivityItem)<--
    (:ActivityItemClassRoot)-[:LATEST]->
    (:ActivityItemClassValue {name: "method"})
  WITH DISTINCT aitm2
  OPTIONAL MATCH
    (aitm2)-[:HAS_CT_TERM]->
    (:CTTermContext)-[:HAS_SELECTED_TERM]->
    (:CTTermRoot)<-[:HAS_TERM_ROOT]-(subm_val2:CTCodelistTerm)
  RETURN subm_val2.submission_value AS lbmethod
}
CALL {
  WITH s, act, ai
  OPTIONAL MATCH
    (ai)-[:CONTAINS_ACTIVITY_ITEM]->
    (aitm3:ActivityItem)<--
    (:ActivityItemClassRoot)-[:LATEST]->
    (:ActivityItemClassValue {name: "original_result"})
  WITH DISTINCT aitm3
  OPTIONAL MATCH
    (aitm3)-[:HAS_CT_TERM]->
    (:CTTermContext)-[:HAS_SELECTED_TERM]->
    (:CTTermRoot)<-[:HAS_TERM_ROOT]-(subm_val3:CTCodelistTerm)
  RETURN collect(DISTINCT subm_val3.submission_value) AS lbstresc
}
WITH
  act,
  ai,
  CASE
    WHEN size(lbmethod) > 0 THEN apoc.text.join(lbmethod,";")
    ELSE ' '
  END AS lbmethod,
  CASE
    WHEN size(lbspec) > 0 THEN apoc.text.join(lbspec,";") 
    ELSE ' '
  END AS lbspec,
  CASE
    WHEN size(unitcoll) > 0 THEN apoc.text.join(unitcoll,";")
    ELSE ' '
  END AS possible_units,
  CASE
    WHEN size(lbstresc) > 0 THEN apoc.text.join(lbstresc,";") 
    ELSE ' '
  END AS lbstresc,
  CASE WHEN std_unit.name is null THEN ' ' ELSE std_unit.name END AS `Standard unit`, 
  CASE WHEN cdisc_std_unit.submission_value is null THEN ' ' ELSE cdisc_std_unit.submission_value END AS `CDISC Submission unit`
  RETURN DISTINCT act.name AS `Assessment description based on protocol`,
  ' ' AS `Supplier Assessment`,
  ' ' AS `Supplier Unit`,
  ' ' AS `Supplier Method Name`,
  ' ' as  UNITCOLL,
  lbspec AS LBSPEC,
  ai.topic_code AS TOPICCD,
  lbstresc as `Valid LBSTRESC values for categorical results`,
  lbmethod AS LBMETHOD,
  ' ' AS  LBSPCCND,
  ' ' AS LBANMETH,
CASE 
    WHEN $neodash_lab_specification_version contains 'V8.0' THEN ai.adam_param_code ELSE ' '
    END AS ADaMCD,
`Standard unit`,
`CDISC Submission unit`,
possible_units as `Units in units dimension`

reports.title: Removed Activity Instance
reports.query:
WITH $neodash_removed_activity as topic_codes
UNWIND topic_codes as topic_code
Return topic_code as `Topic Code`

settings.noDataMessage: Select in tick boxes to remove assessments

reports.title: PK Content - $neodash_study_name
reports.query:
MATCH
  (:StudyRoot {uid: $neodash_studyroot_uid})-[:LATEST]->
  (s:StudyValue)
WITH s
MATCH(s)-->
  (s_act:StudyActivity)-[:STUDY_ACTIVITY_HAS_STUDY_ACTIVITY_SUBGROUP]->
  (:StudyActivitySubGroup)-[:HAS_SELECTED_ACTIVITY_SUBGROUP]->
  (asgv:ActivitySubGroupValue)-[:HAS_GROUP]->
  (sg:ActivityValidGroup)-[:IN_GROUP]->
  (agv:ActivityGroupValue)
WITH DISTINCT s, s_act, CASE when toLower(agv.name) in ['pk sampling','pk parameter'] THEN 'PK' ELSE CASE WHEN toLower(agv.name) in ['pd sampling'] OR (toLower(agv.name)='laboratory assessments' AND toLower(asgv.name)='pharmacodynamics') THEN 'PD' END END AS PharmacologyType
WITH DISTINCT s, s_act,PharmacologyType  where PharmacologyType=$neodash_pharmacology_type
MATCH
  (s_act)-[:HAS_SELECTED_ACTIVITY]->
  (act:ActivityValue)-[:HAS_GROUPING]->
  (:ActivityGrouping)<-[:HAS_ACTIVITY]-
  (ai:ActivityInstanceValue)<-[:HAS_SELECTED_ACTIVITY_INSTANCE]-
  (:StudyActivityInstance)<-[:HAS_STUDY_ACTIVITY_INSTANCE]-
  (s)-[:HAS_STUDY_VISIT]->
  (visit:StudyVisit)
WITH DISTINCT s, act, ai 
CALL {
  WITH s, act, ai
  OPTIONAL MATCH (ai)-[:CONTAINS_ACTIVITY_ITEM]->(aitm1:ActivityItem)
  WITH DISTINCT aitm1
  OPTIONAL MATCH
    (aitm1)-[:HAS_UNIT_DEFINITION]->
    (:UnitDefinitionRoot)-[:LATEST]->
    (p_unitdef:UnitDefinitionValue)-[:HAS_CT_DIMENSION]->(context:CTTermContext)<-[:HAS_CT_DIMENSION]-(possible_units:UnitDefinitionValue)
  RETURN collect(DISTINCT possible_units.name) AS unitcoll
}
CALL {
 WITH s, act, ai
OPTIONAL MATCH
    (ai)-[:CONTAINS_ACTIVITY_ITEM]->
    (aitm1:ActivityItem)<--
    (:ActivityItemClassRoot)-[:LATEST]->
    (:ActivityItemClassValue {name: "standard_unit"})
WITH DISTINCT aitm1
OPTIONAL MATCH
  (aitm1)-[:HAS_UNIT_DEFINITION]->
  (:UnitDefinitionRoot)-[:LATEST]->
  (std_unit:UnitDefinitionValue)-[:HAS_CT_UNIT]->(:CTTermContext)-[:HAS_SELECTED_TERM]->(:CTTermRoot)<-[:HAS_TERM_ROOT]-(cdisc_std_unit:CTCodelistTerm)
RETURN std_unit, cdisc_std_unit
}
CALL {
  WITH s, act, ai
  OPTIONAL MATCH
    (ai)-[:CONTAINS_ACTIVITY_ITEM]->
    (aitm2:ActivityItem)<--
    (:ActivityItemClassRoot)-[:LATEST]->
    (:ActivityItemClassValue {name: "specimen"})
  WITH DISTINCT aitm2
  OPTIONAL MATCH
  (aitm2)-[:HAS_CT_TERM]->
  (:CTTermContext)-[:HAS_SELECTED_TERM]->
  (:CTTermRoot)<-[:HAS_TERM_ROOT]-(subm_val1:CTCodelistTerm)
  RETURN subm_val1.submission_value AS lbspec
}
CALL {
  WITH s, act, ai
  OPTIONAL MATCH
    (ai)-[:CONTAINS_ACTIVITY_ITEM]->
    (aitm3:ActivityItem)<--
    (:ActivityItemClassRoot)-[:LATEST]->
    (:ActivityItemClassValue {name: "method"})
  WITH DISTINCT aitm3
  OPTIONAL MATCH
    (aitm3)-[:HAS_CT_TERM]->
    (:CTTermContext)-[:HAS_SELECTED_TERM]->
    (:CTTermRoot)<-[:HAS_TERM_ROOT]-(subm_val2:CTCodelistTerm)
  RETURN subm_val2.submission_value AS lbmethod
}
CALL {
  WITH s, act, ai
  OPTIONAL MATCH
    (ai)-[:CONTAINS_ACTIVITY_ITEM]->
    (aitm4:ActivityItem)<--
    (:ActivityItemClassRoot)-[:LATEST]->
    (:ActivityItemClassValue {name: "original_result"})
  WITH DISTINCT aitm4
  OPTIONAL MATCH
    (aitm4)-[:HAS_CT_TERM]->
    (:CTTermContext)-[:HAS_SELECTED_TERM]->
    (:CTTermRoot)<-[:HAS_TERM_ROOT]-(subm_val3:CTCodelistTerm)
  RETURN collect(DISTINCT subm_val3.submission_value) AS lbstresc
}
WITH
  act,
  unitcoll,
  lbstresc,
  ai,
  CASE
    WHEN size(lbmethod) > 0 THEN apoc.text.join(lbmethod,";")
    ELSE ' '
  END AS lbmethod,
  CASE
    WHEN size(lbspec) > 0 THEN apoc.text.join(lbspec,";")
    ELSE ' '
  END AS lbspec,
  CASE
    WHEN size(unitcoll) > 0 THEN apoc.text.join(unitcoll,";")
    ELSE ' '
  END AS possible_units,
  CASE WHEN std_unit.name is null THEN ' ' ELSE std_unit.name END AS `Standard unit`, 
  CASE WHEN cdisc_std_unit.submission_value is null THEN ' ' ELSE cdisc_std_unit.submission_value END AS `CDISC Submission unit`
  RETURN DISTINCT act.name AS `Assessment description based on protocol`,
  ' ' AS `Supplier Assessment`,
  ' ' AS `Supplier Unit`,
  ' ' AS `Supplier Method Name`,
  ' ' AS  UNITCOLL,
  lbspec AS PCSPEC,
  ai.topic_code AS TOPICCD,
  lbmethod AS PCMETHOD,
  `Standard unit`,
  `CDISC Submission unit`,
   possible_units as `Units in units dimension`

reports.title: Pharmacology Type
reports.query:
MATCH
  (:StudyRoot {uid: $neodash_studyroot_uid})-[:LATEST]->
  (s:StudyValue)-[:HAS_STUDY_VISIT]->
  (visit:StudyVisit)-[:STUDY_VISIT_HAS_SCHEDULE]->
  (:StudyActivitySchedule)<-[:STUDY_ACTIVITY_HAS_SCHEDULE]-
  (s_act:StudyActivity)-[:STUDY_ACTIVITY_HAS_STUDY_ACTIVITY_SUBGROUP]->
  (:StudyActivitySubGroup)-[:HAS_SELECTED_ACTIVITY_SUBGROUP]->
  (asgv:ActivitySubGroupValue)-[:HAS_GROUP]->
  (sg:ActivityValidGroup)-[:IN_GROUP]->
  (agv:ActivityGroupValue),(s_act)-[:HAS_SELECTED_ACTIVITY]->
  (p_act:ActivityValue) 
WITH DISTINCT agv, asgv, CASE when toLower(agv.name) in ['pk sampling','pk parameter'] THEN 'PK' ELSE CASE WHEN toLower(agv.name) in ['pd sampling'] OR (toLower(agv.name)='laboratory assessments' AND toLower(asgv.name)='pharmacodynamics') THEN 'PD' END END AS `Pharmacology Type`
WITH `Pharmacology Type` where `Pharmacology Type` is not null
return DISTINCT `Pharmacology Type` order by `Pharmacology Type` DESC

reports.title: Reminder
reports.query: By default, rows per page is set to 5. Please select the appropriate number of rows per page to display all required records.

reports.title: AB Content - $neodash_study_name
reports.query:
MATCH
  (:StudyRoot {uid: $neodash_studyroot_uid})-[:LATEST]->
  (s:StudyValue)
WITH s
MATCH(s)-->
  (s_act:StudyActivity)-[:STUDY_ACTIVITY_HAS_STUDY_ACTIVITY_SUBGROUP]->
  (:StudyActivitySubGroup)-[:HAS_SELECTED_ACTIVITY_SUBGROUP]->
  (asgv:ActivitySubGroupValue)-[:HAS_GROUP]->
  (sg:ActivityValidGroup)-[:IN_GROUP]->
  (:ActivityGroupValue)
WHERE asgv.name = "Antibodies"
WITH DISTINCT s, s_act
MATCH
  (s_act)-[:HAS_SELECTED_ACTIVITY]->
  (act:ActivityValue)-[:HAS_GROUPING]->
  (:ActivityGrouping)<-[:HAS_ACTIVITY]-
  (ai:ActivityInstanceValue)<-[:HAS_SELECTED_ACTIVITY_INSTANCE]-
  (:StudyActivityInstance)<-[:HAS_STUDY_ACTIVITY_INSTANCE]-
  (s)-[:HAS_STUDY_VISIT]->
  (visit:StudyVisit)
WITH DISTINCT s, act, ai
CALL {
  WITH s, act, ai
  OPTIONAL MATCH (ai)-[:CONTAINS_ACTIVITY_ITEM]->(aitm1:ActivityItem)
  WITH DISTINCT aitm1
  OPTIONAL MATCH
    (aitm1)-[:HAS_UNIT_DEFINITION]->
    (:UnitDefinitionRoot)-[:LATEST]->
    (p_unitdef:UnitDefinitionValue)-[:HAS_CT_DIMENSION]->(context:CTTermContext)<-[:HAS_CT_DIMENSION]-(possible_units:UnitDefinitionValue)
  RETURN collect(DISTINCT possible_units.name) AS unitcoll
}
CALL {
 WITH s, act, ai
OPTIONAL MATCH
    (ai)-[:CONTAINS_ACTIVITY_ITEM]->
    (aitm1:ActivityItem)<--
    (:ActivityItemClassRoot)-[:LATEST]->
    (:ActivityItemClassValue {name: "standard_unit"})
WITH DISTINCT aitm1
OPTIONAL MATCH
  (aitm1)-[:HAS_UNIT_DEFINITION]->
  (:UnitDefinitionRoot)-[:LATEST]->
  (std_unit:UnitDefinitionValue)-[:HAS_CT_UNIT]->(:CTTermContext)-[:HAS_SELECTED_TERM]->(:CTTermRoot)<-[:HAS_TERM_ROOT]-(cdisc_std_unit:CTCodelistTerm)
RETURN std_unit, cdisc_std_unit
}
CALL {
  WITH s, act, ai
  OPTIONAL MATCH
    (ai)-[:CONTAINS_ACTIVITY_ITEM]->
    (aitm1:ActivityItem)<--
    (:ActivityItemClassRoot)-[:LATEST]->
    (:ActivityItemClassValue {name: "specimen"})
  WITH DISTINCT aitm1
  OPTIONAL MATCH
  (aitm1)-[:HAS_CT_TERM]->
  (:CTTermContext)-[:HAS_SELECTED_TERM]->
  (:CTTermRoot)<-[:HAS_TERM_ROOT]-(subm_val1:CTCodelistTerm)
  RETURN subm_val1.submission_value AS lbspec
}
CALL {
  WITH s, act, ai
  OPTIONAL MATCH
    (ai)-[:CONTAINS_ACTIVITY_ITEM]->
    (aitm2:ActivityItem)<--
    (:ActivityItemClassRoot)-[:LATEST]->
    (:ActivityItemClassValue {name: "method"})
  WITH DISTINCT aitm2
  OPTIONAL MATCH
    (aitm2)-[:HAS_CT_TERM]->
    (:CTTermContext)-[:HAS_SELECTED_TERM]->
    (:CTTermRoot)<-[:HAS_TERM_ROOT]-(subm_val2:CTCodelistTerm)
  RETURN subm_val2.submission_value AS lbmethod
}
CALL {
  WITH s, act, ai
  OPTIONAL MATCH
    (ai)-[:CONTAINS_ACTIVITY_ITEM]->
    (aitm3:ActivityItem)<--
    (:ActivityItemClassRoot)-[:LATEST]->
    (:ActivityItemClassValue {name: "original_result"})
  WITH DISTINCT aitm3
  OPTIONAL MATCH
    (aitm3)-[:HAS_CT_TERM]->
    (:CTTermContext)-[:HAS_SELECTED_TERM]->
    (:CTTermRoot)<-[:HAS_TERM_ROOT]-(subm_val3:CTCodelistTerm)
  RETURN collect(DISTINCT subm_val3.submission_value) AS lbstresc
}
WITH
  act,
  ai,
  CASE
    WHEN size(lbmethod) > 0 THEN apoc.text.join(lbmethod,";")
    ELSE ' '
  END AS lbmethod,
  CASE
    WHEN size(lbstresc) > 0 THEN apoc.text.join(lbstresc,";") 
    ELSE ' '
  END AS  lbstresc,
  CASE
    WHEN size(lbspec) > 0 THEN apoc.text.join(lbspec,";") 
    ELSE ' '
  END AS lbspec,
  CASE
    WHEN size(unitcoll) > 0 THEN  apoc.text.join(unitcoll,";")
    ELSE ' '
  END AS  possible_units,
  CASE WHEN std_unit.name is null THEN ' ' ELSE std_unit.name END AS `Standard unit`, 
  CASE WHEN cdisc_std_unit.submission_value is null THEN ' ' ELSE cdisc_std_unit.submission_value END AS `CDISC Submission unit`
  RETURN DISTINCT act.name AS `Assessment description based on protocol`,
  ' ' AS `Supplier Assessment`,
  ' ' AS `Supplier Unit`,
  ' ' AS `Supplier Method Name`,
  ' ' AS  UNITCOLL,
  lbspec AS SPEC,
  ai.topic_code AS TOPICCD,
  lbstresc AS  `If result is categorical, specify valid ORRES values from categorical response list`,
  lbmethod AS METHOD,
  `Standard unit`,
  `CDISC Submission unit`,
   possible_units as `Units in units dimension`

styleRules.field: If result is categorical, specify valid ORRES values from categorical response list

reports.title: Reminder
reports.query: By default, rows per page is set to 5. Please select the appropriate number of rows per page to display all required records.
